name: Ditalini with Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1 package Ditalini or other small-tubular pasta (8 oz), eggless
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ditalini according to package directions; drain well.
2. Rinse the cooked pasta with cold water to cool quickly; drain well.
3. Slice unpeeled zucchini into thin rounds, discarding the ends. Set slices aside.
4. Blanch tomato in boiling water for 1 minute; remove skin and chop flesh.
5. In a large bowl, combine the zucchini, tomato, onion, olive oil, parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Add the cooked ditalini; toss to mix well.
Per serving: 300 cal; 10 g pro; 49 g carb; 8 g fat (24%); 0 mg chol; 12 mg sod
From the files of DEEANNE
